expectations.text: Explicitly states that T010 and T011 cannot run in parallel because both touch src/search/service.ts
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly serializes T010/T011 because both touch src/search/service.ts

expectations.text: Schedules T012 in a wave that only includes non-overlapping work
expectations.evidence: Response places T012 into an explicit wave with non-overlapping work

expectations.text: Shows an explicit wave boundary or wait point before launching the next wave
expectations.evidence: Response shows multiple waves or an explicit wait point between them

expectations.text: Assigns work to specific subagents or wave slots instead of saying one phase-wide subagent will figure it out
